name: p-coumaric acid
description: p-coumaric acid is a compound reported in adenostoma fasciculatum and agrimonia eupatoria. Available source coverage remains preliminary in this dataset.
effects: Traditional uses include skin and respiratory conditions
contraindications: high doses may cause gastrointestinal upset or phototoxic reactions due to hydroquinone.
Generally safe when used as tea
due to tannins may cause constipation or reduce absorption of minerals
